materialized_county_tax_capability.notes: Harris exemption normalization remains usable for summary-stage support, but missing exemption amounts are still common and senior completeness remains unresolved. | Harris over65 completeness is still unresolved and must remain an explicit county limitation. | Harris disabled-person mappings exist, but observed current-year signal remains sparse enough that the flag should stay limited. | Harris disabled-veteran mappings are strong enough to preserve the total-exemption signal as a supported internal indicator. | Harris freeze truth should stay limited until qualifying-exemption consistency and explicit current-year freeze rows are stronger. | over65_rows=0 | missing_exemption_amount_rows=827052 | latest_refresh=prior_year_adopted_rates/fallback_requested_year_missing_supportable_subjects/rate_cov=0.9999/assign_cov=0.9999
